nextManualSteps: Open a fresh fixture containing exactly `Before\n   \nAfter` in Typora 1.13.4 on Windows.
Use a human-visible caret placement method that clearly lands inside the three-space source line, then type `abc`, insert `FM_SENTINEL_WS_TYPE_TEXT`, save, and screenshot before sentinel insertion.
